title: StartupChecksums
description: Fingerprints of bundled resources successfully applied during server startup.

seedDataFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the bundled seed data and type schemas.

searchTemplateFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the search index templates.

serverVersion.description: Server version that produced these fingerprints.

appliedAt.description: Timestamp when the fingerprints were last persisted.
